---
env:
  - Wolfram Kernel
---
```mathematica
TableForm[table_List]
```
shows the given `table` (list) in a traditional form using [Grid](Grid.md) decoration

import Notebook from '@site/src/components/wljs-notebook-react';

<Notebook code="" name="tapir-985b1">tapir-985b1</Notebook>

:::info
For an editable formatted table, please see [InputTable](../Input/InputTable.md).
:::
